creator: empty.japan
caption:
While I am still working on my Hokkaido travel guide, I would like to share with you my favorite summer route for a 10-14 day car trip that I took a couple of years ago:

Sapporo
⁠Otaru
⁠Ebisu Rock & Daikoku Rock
⁠Misaki no Yu Onsen
⁠Niseko
⁠Lake Toya
⁠Noboribetsu Jigokudani Valley
⁠Lake Shikotsu
⁠Furano
⁠Asahi Dake
⁠Sapporo

If you're looking to discover some of the best hidden gems of Kyoto, Shiga, Nara, and Kinosaki Onsen, be sure to check out my online travel guides 🥰

Locations in the video:
Ebisu & Daikoku Rock, Noboribetsu, Naena Falls, Matsumoto Castle, Ine, Amanohashidate
